episodes.title: Ghislaine Maxwell Sends Mysterious USB to DOJ After Melania Trump's Baffling Epstein Speech
episodes.description:
**Revised Article:**

Convicted child trafficker and Jeffrey Epstein co-conspirator Ghislaine Maxwell sent a mysterious USB drive to the Department of Justice via FedEx on April 16, shortly after First Lady Melania Trump delivered a controversial address at the White House. The USB submission followed Melania's April 9 address in which she firmly denied any personal relationship with Epstein or Maxwell, stating, "The lies linking me with the disgraceful Jeffrey Epstein need to end today."

episodes.title: Donald Trump Had 'No Money' During 2004 Bidding War Against Jeffrey Epstein Over Palm Beach Mansion,
episodes.description:
Author Michael Wolff reports on a 2004 bidding clash between Donald Trump and Jeffrey Epstein over a Palm Beach estate, noting its relevance to their relationship and finances.

In his Epstein Diaries series, Michael Wolff says Trump had "no money" at the time and relied on licensing his name rather than owning properties. The contest centered on Maison de L’Amitié, with Jeffrey Epstein believing he had secured the mansion for $36 million while working closely with retail billionaire Leslie Wexner.

Wolff writes that Trump was still recovering from 1990s setbacks and that Epstein both mocked and admired Trump’s projection of wealth.

Wolff’s Substack account also suggests the dispute may have preceded a lasting split between the two men.
